name: Slipped at work 3 weeks ago in West Valley City, is it too late to file?

mainEntity.name: Slipped at work 3 weeks ago in West Valley City, is it too late to file?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report now—Utah allows 180 days notice, 1 year to file workers' comp.
acceptedAnswer.description: **No, 3 weeks is not too late, but report immediately as Utah requires notice within 180 days for workers' comp.** Delays can lead to claim denial if employer argues lack of notice.[1] Key factors: (1) Statute allows 1 year to formally file but notify sooner; (2) Document symptoms now; (3) Delayed injuries still qualify if work-related. Gather evidence like incident reports. Get a lawyer to submit the claim properly.

description: Report now—Utah allows 180 days notice, 1 year to file workers' comp.
